match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_001",
    "title": "Vanity Introduction",
    "storyBeat": "Introduces Scarlett and the coral lipstick product in studio setting",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool minimalist beauty aesthetic"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_002",
    "title": "Promenade Walk",

    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "fresh breezy effortless coastal morning"
  },
  {

    "visualSummary": "Fresh, clean, minimalist beauty aesthetic with potential energy in the frozen moment."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_004",
    "title": "Shallows Entry",

    "durationSeconds": 9,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "fresh breezy effortless coastal lifestyle, sensory and effortlessly cool mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_005",
    "title": "Sand Flat-lay Product Shot",
    "storyBeat": "Hero product placement with environmental texture",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SAND",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal lifestyle mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_006",
    "title": "Waterline Interaction",
    "storyBeat": "Dynamic product interaction in water with handheld energy",
    "durationSeconds": 9,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - WATERLINE",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool with immediate real light and breezy coastal feel"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_007",
    "title": "Bathroom Shelf Macro",
    "storyBeat": "Clean product still life emphasizing color and minimalism",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - BATHROOM SHELF",

  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_008",
    "title": "Bench Application",
    "storyBeat": "Final application moment tying product to personal lifestyle",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - PROMENADE BENCH",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal lifestyle mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_009",
    "title": "Final Cinematic Wave",
    "storyBeat": "Closing emotional beat with product reveal and end card",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - WATERLINE",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh sensory effortlessly cool golden hour coastal mood"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
